description: Kubers Calling RCA knowledge base. Every confirmed root cause lives here. Agent reads this before every diagnostic to avoid re-investigating known patterns.

patterns.title: SL order fires instantly at entry price

evidence.db_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trade_log WHERE exit_reason='SL_HIT' AND ABS(exit_price-entry_price)<0.01 AND hold_minutes<2

patterns.root_cause: place_sl_order() in execution/broker.py sends order_type=LIMIT at the SL trigger price. INDstocks /order API only supports LIMIT and MARKET — there is no SL-M for equity intraday. A LIMIT SELL at 18.46 when market price is 18.55 is immediately marketable and fills instantly.
patterns.fix_applied: Removed place_sl_order() call entirely. SL now monitored by engine evaluate_exits() every 2.5s via price-based check.
patterns.key_challenge: Exit price equals entry price exactly — price never moved. If SL was triggered by price reaching sl_price, exit_price should be at sl_price not entry_price.

patterns.title: Positions open on INDmoney but absent from Kubers DB

evidence.cause: Engine started at 13:00 with fresh DB. Morning session positions survived on INDmoney.

patterns.root_cause: Engine started mid-day with a fresh DB. Prior session positions survived on INDmoney. Engine was completely blind — no SL monitoring, no time stop, no EOD close from Kubers. force_close_ticker() failed because tickers were not in the token map for the new session.
patterns.fix_applied: _reconcile_positions() added to end of startup(). Compares broker positions vs DB. Warns before 15:00, auto-closes after 15:00 via place_market_order().
patterns.key_challenge: All ghost trades had blank entry_narrative. Blank = position loaded from DB on startup not from live signal — confirmed it was a prior session.

patterns.title: Orders rejected as below MIN_ORDER_VALUE despite correct per_stock_limit

examples: PIDILITIND qty=11 price=1342.40 value=14766 vs MIN=15000
ABB qty=2 price=6184 value=12368 vs MIN=15000

patterns.root_cause: risk_gate.py used int() (floor division) for qty = int(per_stock_limit/price). Floor division structurally guarantees order value is always <= per_stock_limit, often below MIN_ORDER_VALUE. PIDILITIND: int(15000/1342.40)=11, 11*1342.40=14766 < 15000.
patterns.fix_applied: Changed int() to math.ceil(). Added min/max clamp. Added MAX_ORDER_VALUE=45000 to config.py.
patterns.key_challenge: N/A — arithmetic was immediately obvious from the log.

open_investigations.title: Shadow book tick_prices() Phase 1 fills processed in Phase 2 of same call
open_investigations.description: Positions filled in Phase 1 are immediately iterated in Phase 2 of the same tick_prices() call.
open_investigations.fix_status: Written in session, not yet deployed

architecture.shadow_book: strategy/shadow_book.py — simulation only, never places real orders
